hooks.command: cmd=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then echo "--- pre-commit lint ---"; staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.ya?ml$'); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then which yamllint >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "$staged" | xargs yamllint -d relaxed || echo "yamllint not found — skipping lint"; fi; fi

cmd=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\-\-force|-f'; then echo "--- pre-push manifest check ---"; kubectl apply -k argocd-apps/ --dry-run=client 2>&1 && echo "Manifests OK" || { echo "MANIFEST ERRORS — fix before pushing"; exit 1; }; fi

file=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.ya?ml$'; then which yamllint >/dev/null 2>&1 && yamllint -d relaxed "$file" && echo "$file: lint OK" || echo "yamllint not available"; fi
